commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces hard-coded selected harness plugin loading with manifest-based activation, prepares /btw harnesses before selection, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +143. Total +190 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main selects /btw harnesses before selected-plugin activation, while the normal embedded run path already prepares the selected harness plugin before selection. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer-authored protected PR with compatibility-sensitive activation behavior; the remaining action is maintainer review, exact-head CI triage, and an explicit allowlist upgrade decision rather than an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): activate selected harness plugins
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

After a gateway restart, agent harness selection could run before the selected plugin was activated. That kept Copilot and correctly configured external harness plugins unavailable despite a valid manifest and configuration. The BTW side-question path had the same ordering gap.

## Why This Is The Right Fix

Harness activation now uses the shared manifest activation plan for the selected runtime. It preserves disabled-plugin and restrictive-allowlist policy, requires explicit trust for workspace manifest owners, retains Codex provider-owner compatibility, and skips registry work for built-in and CLI-alias runtimes. BTW prepares the selected harness before both initial and canonical-model selection.

## User Impact

Configured Codex, Copilot, and trusted plugin-owned harnesses are available on a cold gateway after restart. Untrusted workspace manifests cannot activate themselves.

## Release Note

Fixes cold-start routing for configured agent harness plugins.

## Validation

- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/harness/runtime-plugin.test.ts src/agents/btw.test.ts src/plugins/activation-planner.test.ts (70 tests)
- Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01kvpp3hr4zdqw796nsdmm1f31: corepack pnpm build
- Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01kvpp3hr4zdqw796nsdmm1f31: corepack pnpm check:changed passed all changed-path guards; the remaining core tsgo failure is unchanged on main at src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/tool-result-context-guard.ts:11
- autoreview --mode local --engine codex: clean
target.author: vincentkoc
